task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into ManageEngine ADAudit Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine ADAudit Plus dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating the agent logged in using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the Database Backup configuration page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Database Backup' or similar settings page is open within the ADAudit Plus web interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the backup schedule is set to Daily at 02:00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The backup frequency dropdown/radio button is set to 'Daily' and the time is set to '02:00' (or 2:00 AM) in the configuration form.

task_completion.description: Verify that the backup storage path is correctly set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The backup storage path or directory field contains exactly 'C:\ADAuditBackups'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the retention policy is set to maintain the last 30 backups.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The field for retention policy (e.g., 'Maintain last X backups') is set to '30'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the backup configuration was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Settings saved successfully') is visible, or the save button has been clicked and the settings persist on the screen.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the web GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with the ADAudit Plus web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands modifying configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually interacted with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the progression of navigating menus, typing into fields, and clicking buttons in the browser.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not just write the answers in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like Notepad) used to simply write down the target configuration as a shortcut.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct target backup configuration states a 'Daily' backup at '02:00', retaining '30' backups, stored in 'C:\ADAuditBackups'.
